rationale: The cited paper appears only in grouped background citations supporting a general claim that pro-environmental social norms are prevalent. The citing paper does not engage with Chen et al. (2019)'s specific media-coverage mechanism, hybrid vehicle context, data, or findings in its hypotheses, design, or interpretation. Its core theory and empirical tests are built around relationship power and couple identity signaling, so this citation functions as broad context rather than a meaningful building block.
